displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #40: The Empire Strikes Back: Battleground Hoth
synopsis: Recovering from his wampa injuries in the Echo Base medical center, Luke shares a tender moment with Leia before Han and Chewbacca arrive; Leia and Han bicker, and she kisses Luke to make Han jealous. Aboard the super Star Destroyer *Executor*, Vader receives the probe droid's data confirming the Rebel base on Hoth and orders the fleet there. Admiral Ozzel brings the fleet out of lightspeed too soon, alerting the Rebels, who raise an energy shield against orbital fire; Vader strangles Ozzel with the Force for the blunder and promotes Piett in his place. The Empire lands AT-AT and AT-ST walkers under General Veers to knock out the shield generators, while Luke leads snowspeeders against the walkers and Bren Derlin commands the ground defense. As Han preps the *Millennium Falcon* to get Leia off-world, Luke's gunner Dak is killed and their speeder crashes, an Imperial walker bearing down to crush it.
title: Star Wars (1977) #40: The Empire Strikes Back: Battleground Hoth
